name: eskyna-farbe
description: Statischer Generator und PWA-Frontend fuer die ESKYNA Farbkarten.

scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run generate
scripts.lint: npm run lint:js && npm run lint:css && npm run lint:html && npm run lint:python
scripts.lint:python: python3 -m py_compile bin/generate && python3 -m compileall -q features
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run validate && npm run build && npm run validate:dist && npm run test:bdd
scripts.test:bdd:build: npm run build && npm run test:bdd
